headline: This Is Why NRG Energy (NRG) Is a Top Utility Stock on Data Center Growth
summary: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) is one of the top utility stocks to buy now. On April 13, Jefferies raised its price target on NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) to $199 from $181 while maintaining a Buy rating. The positive stance comes amid expectations that the company will announce a new 1GW combined-cycle gas turbine project. The […]
